title: The Camp (Sweet House)
description: Where we lived, shared stories, and practiced English 24/7. Strangers became family here.

title: Mango Tree Backyard
description: The shade where we learned grammar rules, debated global issues, and practiced speaking under the afternoon breeze.

title: Warung Mbah Darmo
description: Our daily stop for iced coffee and warm chocolate toast during the 15-minute breaks. It only cost 5,000 rupiah!

title: Daffodil Cafe
description: Late night study sessions, laughing, and eating deep-fried bananas. Open until the midnight chime.

title: Pare Local Stadium
description: Dusty afternoon football matches. Running under the golden sunset, shouting in broken English, and sharing cold water.

title: Kediri Train Station
description: The place of nervous arrivals and tearful departures. The gateway to our beautiful Kampung Inggris adventure.
